decisions.title: Environment scope conflicts with production MVP requirements
decisions.rationale: Bound Dev environment to production-equivalent sizing so all NFRs (99.9% SLA, 500 peak users) are testable; defer separate Production env to post-MVP per user direction.
decisions.applied_change_summary: Added Target Environment row to Project Overview; bound NFR SLA/RTO/RPO entries to Dev-with-prod-equivalent-sizing; updated Complexity Classification rationale; updated Handoff Summary.

decisions.title: Business-record retention conflicts with blob recovery requirements
decisions.rationale: User opted to defer blob retention class split; flagged in Open Risks for the Architect to surface in Step 2 cost estimate.
decisions.applied_change_summary: Recovery Targets matrix notes retention TBD by data class; Open Risks lists REQ-C-02 as deferred.

decisions.title: Public endpoint protection is left below a clear minimum baseline
decisions.rationale: WAF made optional only if Public-Edge Baseline (auth, rate limiting, TLS, logging, alerting, access restrictions) is fully implemented as compensating controls.
decisions.applied_change_summary: Added Public-Edge Baseline table under Network Security; updated WAF row in Network Security; reflected in Recommended Security Controls priority tiers.

decisions.title: Security control set may exceed the MVP budget envelope
decisions.rationale: Added Non-negotiable / Cost-sensitive / Post-MVP priority tiers and required Step 2 to deliver baseline vs secure-plus cost options.
decisions.applied_change_summary: Re-tabled Recommended Security Controls with a Priority column; added explicit cost-estimate requirement (baseline + secure-plus) in note below table; updated Handoff Summary Key Decisions.

decisions.title: External farm API authentication remains ambiguous
decisions.rationale: Entra External ID OAuth required for supplier writes; API keys are exception-only with rotation, scope, and audit.
decisions.applied_change_summary: Updated Integrations table for farm inventory feeds; added Supplier Write Access row in Authentication & Authorization; updated External ID assumption to include suppliers.

decisions.title: RPO target is not scoped across data stores
decisions.rationale: Added per-component RTO/RPO matrix covering SQL, Storage, Key Vault, App Service config, and regional outage (deferred).
decisions.applied_change_summary: New Recovery Targets by Component subsection added under NFRs; NFR top-level RTO/RPO rows now reference the matrix.

decisions.title: Budget control lacks enforceable monitoring requirements
decisions.rationale: Added explicit Cost Monitoring & Enforcement requirements: Azure Budget at envelope, 80/100/120% forecast+actual alerts, anomaly detection, parameterized recipients.
decisions.applied_change_summary: New Cost Monitoring & Enforcement table added in Budget section.

decisions.title: Entra External ID substitution is acceptable but should cite the assumption
decisions.rationale: Documented the External ID tenant provisioning assumption with sizing context (10K consumers, 500 restaurants, 50-200 suppliers).
decisions.applied_change_summary: Added Assumption note under Authentication & Authorization.

decisions.title: Complexity classification undercounts supporting resource types
decisions.rationale: Refined the rationale to enumerate supporting resources Step 2 must include (VNet, NSG, PEs, Private DNS, Action Groups, Budget, RBAC, External ID).
decisions.applied_change_summary: Rewrote Complexity Classification rationale with primary vs supporting resource breakdown.
